dialog: Hello. I'm Neura. I feel a bit... empty. Why am I so grey?
Ah, a new neural network! You are grey because you lack knowledge, my dear. You must learn to gain color.
And how exactly do I learn? Is there an instruction manual?
No manual! Here we learn from experience. Start by collecting 5 Data Chips scattered around, then come back to me. That way we will start your first training Epoch.
